summary: Tested 11 assertions: all 11 passed. All MCP tool assertions verified through code inspection of src/mcp_server.py. memory_inspect exists with full context return (fact details, compressed_details, source message, sibling facts, entities). memory_search_facts shows fact IDs and compressed_details with feedback hints. memory_deep_recall exists with dual FTS search and LLM synthesis with graceful fallback. memory_add_fact accepts error/solution categories. Both memory_inspect and memory_deep_recall handle missing data and ollama-down scenarios gracefully.
